page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Tools for mutation identification in model organism genomes
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Comprehensive software package for mapping-by-sequencing, i.e. for the mapping, identification and annotation of phenotypic mutations in model organisms from whole-genome sequencing (WGS) data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Comprehensive software package for mapping-by-sequencing, i.e. for the mapping, identification and annotation of phenotypic mutations in model organisms from whole-genome sequencing (WGS) data.
